detectors.description:

detectors.description: Variable OpenAddressLottery.LuckyNumber (OpenAddressLottery.sol#67) is not in mixedCase

Reentrancy in OpenAddressLottery.participate() (OpenAddressLottery.sol#85-123):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.transfer(win) (OpenAddressLottery.sol#113)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- reseed(SeedComponents(uint256(block.coinbase),block.difficulty,block.gaslimit,block.timestamp)) (OpenAddressLottery.sol#121)
		- lastReseed = block.number (OpenAddressLottery.sol#151)
	- reseed(SeedComponents(uint256(block.coinbase),block.difficulty,block.gaslimit,block.timestamp)) (OpenAddressLottery.sol#121)
		- secretSeed = uint256(keccak256()(components.component1,components.component2,components.component3,components.component4)) (OpenAddressLottery.sol#139-149)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [OpenAddressLottery.participate()](OpenAddressLottery.sol#L85-L123):
	External calls:
	- [msg.sender.transfer(win)](OpenAddressLottery.sol#L113)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [reseed(SeedComponents(uint256(block.coinbase),block.difficulty,block.gaslimit,block.timestamp))](OpenAddressLottery.sol#L121)
		- [lastReseed = block.number](OpenAddressLottery.sol#L151)
	- [reseed(SeedComponents(uint256(block.coinbase),block.difficulty,block.gaslimit,block.timestamp))](OpenAddressLottery.sol#L121)
		- [secretSeed = uint256(keccak256()(components.component1,components.component2,components.component3,components.component4))](OpenAddressLottery.sol#L139-L149)
